title: Generate Employee Reports (Employee Management)
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Generate Employee Reports" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation

workflow.name: Entity-Record Management
workflow.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Generate Employee Reports

business.reason: Supports the Entity-Record Management business pattern for "Employee Management": Generate Employee Reports is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
validations: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
business.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Generate Employee Reports
business.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Generate Employee Reports" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Generate Employee Reports attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Generate Employee Reports attempted by a role without permission
Generate Employee Reports attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Generate Employee Reports succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Generate Employee Reports is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Generate Employee Reports.
permissionTests: Generate Employee Reports is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Generate Employee Reports -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
coverageRules: REQ-EMPLOYEE-10 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Employee Management Generate Employee Reports changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Generate Employee Reports succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Generate Employee Reports rejected with invalid data
Access: Generate Employee Reports rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
